name: Multi Grain Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups rice milk, soy milk, or skim milk (I used rice milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, cornmeal, wheat germ, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the rice milk (or other milk), lemon juice, and egg whites (or substitute) until foamy for about 30 seconds.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
4. Cook the pancakes as desired.
